# Kuwait

**Summary**: The geographic location of the study, specifically focusing on a reservoir in Kuwait.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2017-janjua|Janjua, 2017]] focused on the Wafra Ratawi field located in Kuwait.

- [[1989-abdou|Abdou, 1989]] analyzed the Kuwait section to define the Gudair Formation.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[2017-janjua|Janjua, 2017]] Carbonate reservoir

- [[1989-abdou|Abdou, 1989]] analyzed the Kuwait section to define the Gudair Formation.

## Formations Present

- [[2017-janjua|Janjua, 2017]] Wafra formation

## Key Findings From This Location

- Core samples from the Wafra Ratawi reservoir were used for core flooding experiments. ([[2017-janjua|Janjua, 2017, p. 86]])

- Located at 28° 55' 13.8" N and 47° 40' 34.5" E. ([[1989-abdou|Abdou, 1989, p. 24]])
